## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between ProjectMark and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and SEO efforts for ProjectMark's construction CRM.](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has added more resources (Sammy) to the account and developed a content strategy focusing on construction CRM topics](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [The team will publish 10 articles this week, focusing on CRM and business development for construction](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [ProjectMark will provide access to their Webflow CMS for GrowthX to publish content directly](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Feedback process established: Thomas will review and comment on proposed topics in Notion/Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [GrowthX is mapping out testable content ideas, focusing on what works with Google](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Initial content may overlap to test effectiveness and gather data](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Strategy aims to build topical authority in construction CRM](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Content will be refined and scaled based on performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)

### Topic Clusters and ICPs

  - [Developed topic clusters based on competitor analysis and ProjectMark's current strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Key ICPs: General contractors, specialty contractors (avoid architects/engineers)](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Focus on roles close to winning work: pre-construction director, business development director, marketing director, senior project managers](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Avoid content for field staff, junior roles, and engineers](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)

### Content Templates and Keywords

  - [Three main templates proposed:](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
    1.  "Benefits of using construction CRM for \[ICP\]"
    2.  "Benefits of construction CRM for \[role\]"
    3.  "CRM vs alternatives for construction projects"
  - [Emphasis on positioning CRM for winning projects, not construction management](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Keywords focus on construction CRM, business development, and project acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)

### SEO and Topical Authority

  - [Aiming to gain "striking distance" for core keywords and ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Some content may target adjacent roles/industries for brand awareness and Google's semantic understanding](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Plan to break down construction CRM functionalities and combine with ICPs in future content](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Content Publishing Process

  - [GrowthX will publish directly to ProjectMark's Webflow site](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - ProjectMark to provide CMS access to <team@cortexlabs.ai>
  - [Juliano from ProjectMark will guide GrowthX on the exact publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to publish 10 articles this week focusing on CRM and business development topics](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [ProjectMark to provide Webflow CMS access to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Thomas to review and provide feedback on proposed topics in Notion/Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [GrowthX to send follow-up with method for Thomas to provide feedback on content](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Juliano to meet with GrowthX on Friday to walk through the CMS publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Next week's meeting to include insights on content performance and scaling plans](https://fathom.video/share/xd7kF9DRSzs4xfRD_RaFT1iXzEYjULL8?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
